name: Blueberry Oatmeal Breakfast Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Frozen blueberries (do not remove from freezer until ready to add to batter)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Grease an 8-inch round baking pan; set aside.
Combine flour, oats, sugar, baking powder and salt in a medium mixing bowl.
Stir together milk, oil and egg. Pour into the flour mixture at once. Stir just until moistened (batter will be lumpy).
Fold in firmly frozen blueberries; spoon batter into prepared pan.
Bake until cake is golden and pulls away from sides of pan, 20 to 25 minutes. Let cool on a rack for 5 to 10 minutes.
Serve warm.
Yield: 8 servings.
The recipe is from the North American Blueberry Council.
